load-pdf-retrieve-xmp-metadata.title: Load PDF and Retrieve XMP Metadata
load-pdf-retrieve-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF file to a PdfXmpMetadata facade and extract its XMP metadata as a byte array or UTF‑8 string.

create-xmp-metadata-pdf.title: Create XMP Metadata and Embed in PDF
create-xmp-metadata-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a PDF, register XMP namespaces, add custom XMP metadata entries, and save the document with the metadata automatically embedded.

detect-xmp-metadata-in-pdf.title: Detect XMP Metadata in a PDF
detect-xmp-metadata-in-pdf.description: Shows how to check whether a PDF file contains XMP metadata using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata class before performing any modifications.

set-baseurl-in-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Set BaseURL in PDF XMP Metadata
set-baseurl-in-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to the XMP metadata facade, set the BaseURL property, and save the updated document.

set-xmp-creatortool-to-app-version.title: Set XMP CreatorTool Property to Application Version
set-xmp-creatortool-to-app-version.description: Shows how to assign the XMP metadata CreatorTool field in a PDF to the executing assembly's version using Aspose.Pdf.

set-xmp-nickname-property.title: Set XMP Nickname Property in PDF
set-xmp-nickname-property.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, add or replace the XMP Nickname metadata property, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-nickname-from-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Remove Nickname Element from PDF XMP Metadata
remove-nickname-from-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to delete the Nickname element from a PDF's XMP metadata using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API and save the updated document.

retrieve-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Retrieve XMP Metadata from PDF
retrieve-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF using PdfXmpMetadata and extract its raw XMP XML as a UTF‑8 string.

read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Read XMP Metadata from a PDF
read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file, extract its XMP packet as XML, and query common metadata fields such as creator, title, and creation date.

modify-xmp-creator-property.title: Modify XMP Creator Property in a PDF
modify-xmp-creator-property.description: Shows how to read the XMP metadata from a PDF, edit the dc:creator node, and write the updated metadata back using Aspose.Pdf.

update-multiple-xmp-properties-atomicall.title: Update Multiple XMP Properties Atomically in PDF
update-multiple-xmp-properties-atomicall.description: Shows how to bind XMP metadata to a PDF, add several XMP properties, and save the changes in a single transaction using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-pdf-info-and-xmp-metadata.title: Update PDF Document Properties and XMP Metadata
update-pdf-info-and-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to modify standard PDF document properties and XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf facades, then save the PDF with the updated information.

insert-pdf-pages-update-xmp-metadata.title: Insert PDF Pages and Update XMP Metadata
insert-pdf-pages-update-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates inserting pages from one PDF into another using PdfFileEditor and then updating the document's XMP metadata with PdfXmpMetadata before saving.

preserve-xmp-metadata-when-splitting-pdf.title: Preserve XMP Metadata When Splitting PDF Pages
preserve-xmp-metadata-when-splitting-pdf.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a multi‑page PDF and attach it to each single‑page PDF generated by splitting the document.

copy-xmp-metadata-and-merge-pdfs.title: Copy XMP Metadata and Merge PDFs
copy-xmp-metadata-and-merge-pdfs.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a source PDF with PdfXmpMetadata, apply it to a target PDF, and then merge the source pages into the target document.

export-xmp-metadata-to-sidecar.title: Export XMP Metadata from PDF to Side‑car File
export-xmp-metadata-to-sidecar.description: Demonstrates how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save it as a separate .xmp side‑car file.

replace-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Replace PDF XMP Metadata from External File
replace-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read an external .xmp file, and replace the PDF's existing XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-xmp-metadata-in-pdf.title: Validate XMP Metadata in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
validate-xmp-metadata-in-pdf.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, load it into an XmlDocument, and validate it against an XSD schema while logging validation results.

set-xmp-property-if-empty.title: Set XMP Property Only If Empty with Warning
set-xmp-property-if-empty.description: Demonstrates how to update an XMP metadata property in a PDF only when the property is missing or empty, logging a warning if it already contains a non‑empty value.

log-xmp-metadata-size-before-after-modif.title: Log XMP Metadata Size Before and After Modification
log-xmp-metadata-size-before-after-modif.description: Loads a PDF, reads its XMP metadata using PdfXmpMetadata, logs the original size, adds a custom field, logs the new size, and saves the updated document.

extract-audit-original-xmp-metadata.title: Extract and Audit Original XMP Metadata from PDF
extract-audit-original-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, retrieve its XMP metadata using the PdfXmpMetadata facade, and save the original XML for audit purposes.

add-creator-metadata-to-pdf-document.title: Add Creator Metadata to PDF Document
add-creator-metadata-to-pdf-document.description: Shows how to add or update the Creator XMP metadata of an Aspose.Pdf.Document by using the PdfFileInfo facade within a reusable extension method.

clear-all-xmp-metadata.title: Clear All XMP Metadata from PDF
clear-all-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to remove every XMP metadata entry from a PDF while keeping the mandatory PDF schema header using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Remove XMP Metadata from PDF
remove-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete the entire XMP metadata block from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfXmpMetadata facade.

decrypt-encrypted-pdf-with-pdffilesecuri.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with PdfFileSecurity Facade
decrypt-encrypted-pdf-with-pdffilesecuri.description: Shows how to bind an encrypted PDF using PdfFileSecurity, handle InvalidPasswordException by loading the document with a password, and decrypt the file to an unprotected copy.

decrypt-update-creator-reencrypt-pdf.title: Decrypt PDF, Update Creator Metadata, and Re‑Encrypt
decrypt-update-creator-reencrypt-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF using the owner password, changing the Creator metadata, and then re‑encrypting the document with new passwords and permissions.

write-verify-xmp-metadata-pdf.title: Write and Verify XMP Metadata in PDF
write-verify-xmp-metadata-pdf.description: Creates a PDF, writes custom XMP metadata fields (BaseUrl, CreatorTool, Nickname) using PdfFileInfo, and reads them back to confirm the values.

verify-basepath-uri-escaping.title: Verify BasePath URI Escaping in XfaParserOptions
verify-basepath-uri-escaping.description: Unit test that ensures the BasePath property of XfaParserOptions correctly escapes spaces and non‑ASCII characters in a URL.

benchmark-xmp-metadata-extraction.title: Benchmark XMP Metadata Extraction from Large PDF
benchmark-xmp-metadata-extraction.description: Shows how to measure the time required to read XMP metadata from a large PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades. Includes a warm‑up run and a Stopwatch‑based benchmark.

update-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Update PDF Creator Metadata in a Folder
update-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Shows how to scan a directory for PDF files and set the Creator (CreatorTool) XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-xmp-property-in-pdf.title: Update XMP Property in PDF via Command Line
update-xmp-property-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata class to add or update a specific XMP metadata property in a PDF file from a command‑line tool.

extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf-byte-array.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF Byte Array
extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf-byte-array.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF in memory, bind its byte array to the PdfXmpMetadata facade, and retrieve the XMP metadata as an XML byte array.

update-xmp-baseurl.title: Update XMP BaseURL in PDF
update-xmp-baseurl.description: Shows how to load a PDF, modify the XMP "xmp:BaseURL" property, and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.

read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf-unc.title: Read XMP Metadata from PDF via UNC Path
read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf-unc.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF located on a network share using a UNC path and extracting its XMP metadata with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

list-xmp-namespaces-in-pdf.title: List XMP Namespaces in a PDF
list-xmp-namespaces-in-pdf.description: Shows how to extract the XMP metadata from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and enumerate the namespace declarations defined in that metadata.

add-minimal-xmp-metadata-fallback.title: Add Minimal XMP Metadata Fallback to PDF
add-minimal-xmp-metadata-fallback.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF to the PdfXmpMetadata facade, checking for existing XMP metadata, and inserting basic title, creator, and creation date when none is present before saving the file.

export-xmp-metadata-to-json.title: Export XMP Metadata from PDF to JSON
export-xmp-metadata-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, convert the XML into a dictionary structure, and serialize it as JSON for integration with non‑XML systems.

compress-pdf-read-xmp-metadata.title: Compress PDF with High Compression and Read XMP Metadata
compress-pdf-read-xmp-metadata.description: The example compresses a PDF using high‑compression settings via OptimizationOptions and then extracts the XMP metadata from the compressed file using the PdfXmpMetadata facade.

validate-mandatory-xmp-metadata.title: Validate Mandatory XMP Metadata Before Publishing PDF
validate-mandatory-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to check for required XMP metadata fields in a PDF, perform PDF/A validation, and save the document only when all checks pass.

add-timestamp-to-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Add Timestamp to PDF XMP Metadata
add-timestamp-to-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to embed a custom ISO‑8601 timestamp into the XMP metadata of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-xmp-metadata-to-dictionary.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF to Dictionary
extract-xmp-metadata-to-dictionary.description: Shows how to read XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata and convert it into a case‑insensitive dictionary of string key/value pairs.

set-pdf-creator-metadata-default.title: Set PDF Creator Metadata with a Default Value
set-pdf-creator-metadata-default.description: Demonstrates how to set the Creator metadata field of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, applying a configurable default when no value is supplied.

disable-baseurl-injection-for-pdf-genera.title: Disable BaseUrl Injection for PDF Generation in Test Environments
disable-baseurl-injection-for-pdf-genera.description: Demonstrates using a configuration switch to control HtmlLoadOptions, disabling BaseUrl injection when converting HTML to PDF in test environments.

nightly-creator-metadata-refresh.title: Nightly Creator Metadata Refresh for PDFs
nightly-creator-metadata-refresh.description: Shows how to schedule a daily job that scans a folder of PDFs and updates the Creator XMP metadata field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.
